build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(80, 80, 15)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(3).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=15).rect(60, 60).extrude(1.5)

STEP 4: Create knurled grip — .faces("<Z").workplane(centered=True).rect(70, 70).knurl(pitch=2, width=3)
